flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Campbell University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.8k vs 3.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Campbell University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 2.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Campbell University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Campbell University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (40.4% → 47.6%).
